description: Late letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Probably 18th or 19th century. Mentions Jerusalem. From a certain Mordekhay al-Baḥrī[?] to Merkada and Brahem Diyalo[?] (דייאלו). Possibly a North African dialect. On the verso the address lists "Yemen" as the destination. ASE. MCD.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לתימן. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
